title: ALOH (at least one hp)
description: A Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.1+ that prevents selected players from dying by keeping their health at a minimum of half a heart.
body:
# At Least One HP (ALOH)

A Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.1+ that prevents selected players from dying by keeping their health at a minimum of half a heart.

## Features

- Players take damage normally but their HP never drops below 1 (half a heart)
- Knockback, hit animations, and damage effects still work
- Simple command system to manage immortal players
- Requires operator permissions (level 2)

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/aloh add <player>` | Make a player immortal |
| `/aloh remove <player>` | Remove immortality from a player |
| `/aloh list` | Show count of immortal players |

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.1+
- Fabric Loader 0.18.1+
- Fabric API

## Installation

1. Install Fabric Loader for Minecraft 1.21.1+
2. Download Fabric API and place it in the `mods` folder
3. Place `aloh.jar` in the `mods` folder
4. Start the server/game

Made for my friend [Nantag](https://www.youtube.com/@NantagMC) he does really cool videos go check them out if you want
